violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
Handwashing sink in the kitchen was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by (bakers rack). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Various food product was observed held at (50-117) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated food to proper temperatures during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Chocolate bananas in a display freezer are stored in a manner that does not protect/prevent from contamination. Person in charge instructed to keep food items covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hot hold units, bakers racks, and 1 dr refrigerator(basement) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The ceiling and ceiling vents in kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The following physical facilities are in poor repair: 1.basement wall near stairs has a hole. 2.ceiling in retail area observed with a hole. 3.Ceiling tile broken exposing electrical wires and light bulb (not protected). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
